Security tip: Recommended Study Timeline

Plan for approximately 4-6 weeks of dedicated study. Here is a suggested weekly breakdown: Week 1: Domain 1: IT Concepts — Binary/Hex/Decimal, Data types, Computing basics, Logic gates Week 2: Domain ...

- Week 1: Domain 1: IT Concepts — Binary/Hex/Decimal, Data types, Computing basics
- Week 2: Domain 2: Infrastructure — Hardware components, Peripherals, Storage, Ne
- Week 3: Domain 3: Applications & Software — Operating systems, Software types, L
- Week 4: Domain 4: Software Development — Programming concepts, Variables, Contro
